title: digitaria leiantha var. leucotricha
intro: Digitaria leiantha var. leucotricha is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria leiantha var. leucotricha include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. Herbal preparations involving this plant typically involve boiling the leaves in water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
